author_identification.canonical_name_ar: نصر بن إبراهيم بن نصر بن إبراهيم ابن داود النابلسي المقدسي، أبو الفتح المعروف بابن أبي حافظ
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Hadith scholar and jurist known for his contributions to the Shafi'i school

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A work addressing the prohibition of temporary marriage (mut'ah) based on hadith evidence
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contributes to the legal and hadith discourse on the prohibition of mut'ah marriage
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: حماد بن محمد الأنصاري is a respected scholar and editor known for his work in hadith and fiqh
